state_space: Repertoire of lymphocyte antigen receptors and antibody concentrations
dynamics_operator: Antigen presentation, clonal expansion, somatic hypermutation, affinity maturation
perturbation_operator: Pathogen invasion, mutational escape, self-antigen exposure
stability_condition: Pathogen clearance rate exceeds pathogen replication rate
failure_mode: Immune exhaustion, immune evasion, or autoimmune cascade
timescale_regime: Days to weeks (clonal expansion), years (memory persistence)
notes: Maintenance and perturbation involve coupled sequence-space evolution.
